==Revision (2025-05-13T18:39:23Z): (Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Applied sciences]])== {{Commons category}} {{Wiktionarycat|type=architecture|category=Architecture}} {{Portal|Architecture}} {{Cat main|Architecture}} {{Infobox library classification |DDC=720 |LCC=NA |UDC=72}}
'''Architecture''' is the art and science of designing buildings. A wider definition includes all design of the [[built environment]], [[urban planning]], [[urban design]], and [[landscape architecture]].
{{selfref|Discussion of Architecture categories can be made on the talk page of [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Architecture/Categories]].}}
[[Category:Construction]]
[[Category:Engineering disciplines]] [[Category:Visual arts]] [[Category:Works by medium]] {{CatAutoTOC}}

==Revision (2025-05-13T18:39:23Z): (Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Applied sciences]])== {{Commons category}} {{Wiktionarycat|type=architecture|category=Architecture}} {{Portal|Architecture}} {{Cat main|Architecture}} {{Infobox library classification |DDC=720 |LCC=NA |UDC=72}}
'''Architecture''' is the art and science of designing buildings. A wider definition includes all design of the [[built environment]], [[urban planning]], [[urban design]], and [[landscape architecture]].

[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] == (2025-05-13T18:39:23Z): (Bot: remove sole member from )== {{Commons category}} {{Wiktionarycat|type=architecture|category=Architecture}} {{Portal|Architecture}} {{Cat main|Architecture}} {{Infobox library classification |DDC=720 |LCC=NA |UDC=72}}
'''Architecture''' is the art and science of designing buildings. A wider definition includes all design of the [[built environment]], [[urban planning]], [[urban design]], and [[landscape architecture]].
{{selfref|Discussion of Architecture categories can be made on the talk page of .}}

'''Architecture''' is the art and science of designing buildings. A wider definition includes all design of the [[built environment]], [[urban planning]], [[urban design]], and [[landscape architecture]].
{{selfref|Discussion of Architecture categories can be made on the talk page of .}}

{{Commons category}} {{Wiktionarycat|type=architecture|category=Architecture}} {{Portal|Architecture}} {{Cat main|Architecture}} {{Infobox library classification |DDC=720 |LCC=NA |UDC=72}} '''Architecture''' is the art and science of designing buildings. {{Commons category}} {{Wiktionarycat|type=architecture|category=Architecture}} {{Portal|Architecture}} {{Cat main|Architecture}} {{Infobox library classification |DDC=720 |LCC=NA |UDC=72}} '''Architecture''' is the art and science of designing buildings. A wider definition includes all design of the [[:en:built environment|built environment]], [[:en:Urban planning|Urban planning]], [[:en:Urban design|Urban design]], and [[:en:Landscape architecture|Landscape architecture]]. {{selfref|Discussion of Architecture categories can be made on the talk page of .}} {{CatAutoTOC}}

{{Commons category}} {{Wiktionarycat|type=architecture|category=Architecture}} {{Portal|Architecture}} {{Cat main|Architecture}} {{Infobox library classification |DDC=720 |LCC=NA |UDC=72}} '''Architecture''' is the art and science of designing buildings. A wider definition includes all design of the [[:en:built environment|built environment]], [[:en:Urban planning|Urban planning]], [[:en:Urban design|Urban design]], and [[:en:Landscape architecture|Landscape architecture]]. {{selfref|Discussion of Architecture categories can be made on the talk page of .}} {{CatAutoTOC}}

{{Commons category}} {{Wiktionarycat|type=architecture|category=Architecture}} {{Portal|Architecture}} {{Cat main|Architecture}} {{Infobox library classification |DDC=720 |LCC=NA |UDC=72}} '''Architecture''' is the art and science of designing buildings. A wider definition includes all design of the [[:en:built environment|built environment]], [[:en:Urban planning|Urban planning]], [[:en:Urban design|Urban design]], and [[:en:Landscape architecture|Landscape architecture]]. {{selfref|Discussion of Architecture categories can be made on the talk page of .}} {{CatAutoTOC}}

{{Commons category}} {{Wiktionarycat|type=architecture|category=Architecture}} {{Portal|Architecture}} {{Cat main|Architecture}} {{Infobox library classification |DDC=720 |LCC=NA |UDC=72}} '''Architecture''' is the art and science of designing buildings. A wider definition includes all design of the [[:en:built environment|built environment]], [[:en:Urban planning|Urban planning]], [[:en:Urban design|Urban design]], and [[:en:Landscape architecture|Landscape architecture]]. {{selfref|Discussion of Architecture categories can be made on the talk page of .}} {{CatAutoTOC}}

{{Commons category}} {{Wiktionarycat|type=architecture|category=Architecture}} {{Portal|Architecture}} {{Cat main|Architecture}} {{Infobox library classification |DDC=720 |LCC=NA |UDC=72}} '''Architecture''' is the art and science of designing buildings. A wider definition includes all design of the [[:en:built environment|built environment]], [[:en:Urban planning|Urban planning]], [[:en:Urban design|Urban design]], and [[:en:Landscape architecture|Landscape architecture]]. {{selfref|Discussion of Architecture categories can be made on the talk page of .}} {{CatAutoTOC}}

{{Commons category}} {{Wiktionarycat|type=architecture|category=Architecture}} {{Portal|Architecture}} {{Cat main|Architecture}} {{Infobox library classification |DDC=720 |LCC=NA |UDC=72}} '''Architecture''' is the art and science of designing buildings. A wider definition includes all design of the [[:en:built environment|built environment]], [[:en:Urban planning|Urban planning]], [[:en:Urban design|Urban design]], and [[:en:Landscape architecture|Landscape architecture]]. {{selfref|Discussion of Architecture categories can be made on the talk page of .}} {{CatAutoTOC}}

{{Commons category}} {{Wiktionarycat|type=architecture|category=Architecture}} {{Portal|Architecture}} {{Cat main|Architecture}} {{Infobox library classification |DDC=720 |LCC=NA |UDC=72}} '''Architecture''' is the art and science of designing buildings. A wider definition includes all design of the [[:en:built environment|built environment]], [[:en:Urban planning|Urban planning]], [[:en:Urban design|Urban design]], and [[:en:Landscape architecture|Landscape architecture]]. {{selfref|Discussion of Architecture categories can be made on the talk page of .}} {{CatAutoTOC}}

{{Commons category}} {{Wiktionarycat|type=architecture|category=Architecture}} {{Portal|Architecture}} {{Cat main|Architecture}} {{Infobox library classification |DDC=720 |LCC=NA |UDC=72}} '''Architecture''' is the art and science of designing buildings. A wider definition includes all design of the [[:en:built environment|built environment]], [[:en:Urban planning|Urban planning]], [[:en:Urban design|Urban design]], and [[:en:Landscape architecture|Landscape architecture {{selfref|Discussion of Architecture categories can be made on the talk page of .}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
